# Close an account using the API

## Close with the API {#api}

If the account's [legal representative](/get-started/set-up-swan/glossary#legal-representative) requests account closure, start the process **with the API**.

:::caution Suspended accounts
Only Swan can act on `Suspended` accounts.
If the [status](/accounts/concepts/account/statuses) is `Suspended`, you can't use the API to close the account.
:::

### Guide

1. Call the `closeAccount` mutation with the legal representative's [user access token](/build/using-api/authentication#tokens-user).
1. The API returns a `consentUrl`.
1. Send the `consentUrl` to the account's legal representative so they can complete [Strong Customer Authentication](/users/concepts/consent#sca).
1. As soon as the legal representative consents, the account status changes to `Closing`.

:::note Account statuses
Refer to the [account statuses](/accounts/concepts/account/statuses) section for an overview of what happens while an account is `Closing`.
:::

### Mutation

<a href="https://explorer.swan.io?%3D&tab=api" className="explorer-badge">Open in API Explorer</a>

```graphql title="Mutation" {4-6,12} showLineNumbers
mutation closeAccount {
  closeAccount(
    input: {
      accountId: "$YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID"
      reason: { type: ClosingRequested }
      consentRedirectUrl: "$YOUR_REDIRECT_URL"
    }
  ) {
    ... on CloseAccountSuccessPayload {
      __typename
      consent {
        consentUrl
      }
    }
  }
}

```

### Payload

```graphql title="Payload" {6} showLineNumbers
{
  "data": {
    "closeAccount": {
      "__typename": "CloseAccountSuccessPayload",
      "consent": {
        "consentUrl": "https://identity.swan.io/consent?consentId=$YOUR_CONSENT_ID&env=Sandbox"
      }
    }
  }
}
```
